Evidence: access-list outside_in extended permit ip any any
Remediation: Review each permit ip any any rule and scope it to required sources, destinations, and services.
Configure aaa authentication ssh console <server-group> LOCAL.
Set ssl server-version tlsv1.2 (or higher) for WebVPN/management TLS.

Evidence: crypto ipsec ikev1 transform-set legacy-ts esp-3des esp-md5-hmac
Remediation: Migrate to IKEv2 with AES-256, SHA-2 integrity, and DH group 16 or higher.
Configure one or more logging host destinations (STIG requires two).
Set console timeout to a value between 1 and 5 minutes.
Set http server idle-timeout to 5 minutes or less (or disable the http server if unused).
Remove ssh access on the outside interface; restrict SSH to an internal management interface.
Set ssh timeout to 5 minutes or less.
Configure: ssh version 2 (not applicable on ASA 9.16+, which is SSHv2-only).
Remove all telnet access lines and use SSHv2 for management.
Configure aaa authentication serial console <server-group> LOCAL.
Configure aaa authorization command <server-group> LOCAL.
Configure password-policy minimum-uppercase/lowercase/numeric/special (>= 1 each).
Configure aaa local authentication attempts max-fail 3 (or per policy).
Configure password-policy minimum-length and complexity (uppercase/lowercase/numeric/special).
Configure: no service password-recovery (ensure documented break-glass procedures).

Evidence: crypto map outside_map 10 match address split_tunnel
Remediation: Configure set pfs (group 14 or higher) on the crypto map.
Set ssl cipher to a high/strong cipher set (e.g., ssl cipher tlsv1.2 high).
Restrict ICMP to the device with icmp deny/permit statements (e.g., icmp deny any outside).
Enable ip verify reverse-path interface <untrusted-interface>.
Configure: logging enable.
Configure logging trap (e.g., notifications or informational).
Restrict ssh/http access lines to specific management subnets on an internal interface.
Enable ntp authenticate with an authentication-key and trusted-key for each ntp server.
Replace SNMP v1/v2c communities with SNMPv3 using auth (SHA) and priv (AES).
Upgrade to a currently-supported ASA release; verify against Cisco EoL notices (refresh the reference with Update-AsaEolData.ps1).
Append an explicit "deny ip any any log" to the bound access-list.
Append an explicit "deny ip any any log" to the bound access-list.
Append an explicit "deny ip any any log" to the bound access-list.
Configure a banner login with the organization-approved notice text.
Configure a banner motd with the organization-approved text.
Configure aaa accounting command <server-group>.
Configure password-policy lifetime (e.g., 90 days, per policy).
Configure a dns server-group with one or more name-server entries.
Configure threat-detection scanning-threat (optionally with shun).
Configure threat-detection statistics (e.g., tcp-intercept).
Set logging buffer-size to 524288 (512 KB) or larger.
Configure logging timestamp.
